name: NBHD Insights Tools
description: Trajectory tools for the assistant baseline — query a tenant's pillar snapshots over time, drill into a specific period, and compare two periods. Phase 1 supports pillar=gravity only.

apiBaseUrl.description: Override NBHD API base URL. Defaults to NBHD_API_BASE_URL env var.

requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for NBHD runtime endpoint requests.
